home.heroDescription: Based in Sousse, Tunisia, passionate about AI and modern technologies.

about.title: About Me
about.description1: As a computer engineer specialized in software engineering at EPI Digital School, I am passionate about application development and artificial intelligence. My background has allowed me to build a strong command of full-stack environments (Angular, Spring Boot, React, Node.js) as well as AI and data science tools (Python, RAG, LLM, PyTorch, Pandas), and quality coverage through automated testing (Cucumber, Selenium, Appium).
about.description2: Curious, thorough, and creative, I enjoy taking on technical challenges and working on innovative projects that combine web development, mobile development, and artificial intelligence. My goal is to design efficient, useful solutions while continuing to grow in a stimulating and collaborative environment.

projects.title: My Projects
projects.subtitle: Discover my achievements and development experiences

telecare.title: EITA TeleCare – Intelligent Telemedicine Platform
telecare.description: Intelligent telemedicine platform featuring a clinical AI chatbot based on RAG (Ollama, Qdrant), a medical OCR module (Tesseract), a Spring Boot microservices architecture (Eureka, API Gateway, Keycloak/JWT, PostgreSQL, Redis, Kafka), multi-channel interfaces (React, Flutter) with WebRTC video conferencing and real-time WebSocket/STOMP messaging, plus automated testing (Cucumber, Selenium, Appium).

workwave.title: WorkWave Platform
workwave.description: Web platform for freelancers and companies (matching, project management, profiles).

medical.title: Medical Appointment Chatbot
medical.description: Medical pre-diagnosis system with AI chatbot (Rasa) and appointment booking.

eniso.title: Site ENISO
eniso.description: Showcase website for ENISO, presenting activities and clubs.

data.title: Data Analysis Project
data.description: Data analysis with visualization and insight extraction.

appmobile.title: Medical Mobile Application
appmobile.description: Android mobile application for medical consultations developed with Kotlin.

ecommerce.title: Casaques E-Commerce Mobile App
ecommerce.description: Mobile e-commerce application for selling traditional casaques (Tunisian clothing) developed with Flutter. Offers a smooth user experience for browsing collections, searching products, and making purchases. Integrated with Firebase for user authentication and product data management.

smart-ecommerce.title: Intelligent E-commerce Platform with AI(chatbot and a virtual clothing try-on system )
smart-ecommerce.description: E-commerce platform integrating a multilingual AI chatbot to manage the entire website workflow and a virtual clothing try-on system, with integration of external payment APIs (PayPal, Stripe, Orange Money).

interests.programmingDesc: Solving algorithmic problems to improve skills.

services.frontendDesc: Creating modern, responsive and high-performance interfaces.
services.backendDesc: Creating secure REST APIs and microservice architectures.
services.aiDesc: Developing intelligent solutions and data analysis.

pfe.description: Design and development of an intelligent telemedicine platform (EITA TeleCare) featuring a clinical AI chatbot based on RAG (Ollama, Qdrant) to support patients and healthcare professionals, as well as a medical OCR module (Tesseract) to extract text from clinical PDFs and images and enrich medical records. Implementation of a Spring Boot microservices architecture (Eureka, API Gateway) with a secured REST API (Keycloak / JWT), dedicated PostgreSQL databases, Redis cache and locks, and asynchronous communication via Apache Kafka. Development of multi-channel interfaces: web application (React, Tailwind, i18n), admin back-office (React / Vite), and patient mobile app (Flutter), with WebRTC video conferencing and real-time messaging via WebSocket / STOMP. Quality coverage ensured through unit tests and automated tests (Cucumber, Selenium, Appium).

satoripop2025.description: Design and development of an intelligent e-commerce platform integrating a multilingual AI chatbot managing the full site workflow and a virtual try-on system (VITON-HD, OpenPose, PyTorch). Implementation of a microservices architecture (Spring Boot, Flask, Angular) with a secured REST API (JWT), product catalog, cart, orders, and payments management (PayPal, Stripe, Orange Money). Development of a modern and responsive interface (Angular 17, TypeScript, SCSS).

satoripop2024.description: Development of a full-stack web application for medical emergency services management, including call coordination, mission tracking, and medical staff management. Microservices architecture with Spring Boot, JHipster, and Angular. Integration of Google Maps for geolocation and access security via JWT. Development of a responsive multilingual interface and setup of automated tests with Docker.

avionav.description: “SMART COCKPIT” project: design of an embedded system for light aircraft modernizing the cockpit through a touchscreen centralizing airspeed, altitude, and artificial horizon. Development of a real-time airspeed interface with Qt/QML on Raspberry Pi 4B, and sensor integration (BMP280) via Python (PyQt5/PySide).
